===Pokémon Evolutions===
[[File:Hop Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Hop in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Prior to the events of ''[[PE01|The Champion]]'', Hop assisted {{ga|Victor}} in battling against {{p|Eternatus}} during the [[Darkest Day]]. While they were unable to defeat Eternatus on their own, they were soon joined by {{p|Zacian}} and {{p|Zamazenta}}. With the assistance of the [[Legendary Pokémon]], they were able to weaken Eternatus enough for Victor to catch it and end the Darkest Day.

In the present day, Hop was at the [[Wyndon Stadium]], cheering for Leon as he prepared to start his Championship Match against Victor.
